race.comment: REGAL GENT (3) resumed with an encouraging run at Echuca when firmly in the market, beaten under a length into third. He'll be fitter now and if they look to push on from out wide he can take catching. SET ME FREE (9) is a filly by Shamus Award on debut for the Hayes yard who has trialled well enough and has claims. JUSTIQUE (8) is a Justify filly on debut for the Hayes yard who has won a jumpout and can run well. WARREGO (5) raced just once last campaign for fifth at Moonee Valley. Readied with two trials and should get a nice run from the inside draw.
